gateway_join_mode: Press the button on the EcoPlus Gateway 3 times.
The logo will begin flashing — this confirms the gateway is in Join Mode.
Join window remains open for 15 minutes.
ecoinsight_join: Press the small middle button: Left, Left, Right, Right.
The EcoInsight will enter pairing mode.
ecosource_join: Press the button on the EcoSource 5 times.
The EcoSource will enter pairing mode.
ecoair_to_source: On the EcoAir, hold the On/Off button until the display shows the last two digits of the EcoSource MAC address.
ecotouch_to_source: Press the button on the EcoSource 7 times to put it in pairing mode.
On the EcoTouch screen, perform a three-finger tap.
Tap Configure, enter password C57A, tap Pair, then tap Search.
The EcoSource MAC address should appear in the results — select it to complete pairing.
sensor_door_contact_to_insight: On the EcoInsight, press: Left, Left, Left, Left, Right, Right, Right, Right.
The display will show 'Learn Mesh' — this confirms it is ready to receive.
Press the button on the occupancy sensor 4 times.
Wait for the sensor light to blink 4 times fast — this confirms successful pairing.
For a door contact: press the button 4 times, then listen for 4 beeps to confirm mesh join.
Press the door contact button 8 more times to associate it to the magnet.
ecoinsight_legacy_join: Put EcoInsight into Learn Mode: Press Left 4 times, then Right 4 times.
Press the Join/Bind tab on the EcoSense 4 times.
Verify the light blinks slowly, then flashes 4 times to confirm pairing.
door_lock_pairing_ving: Plug serial cable into the master thermostat.
Access slot 1 and execute command: jn -t 120
Present the discovery key to the lock face.
Place the EMI key on the lock to assign the room number.
